ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment entry */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Run number of the experiment */,
  "trial" INTEGER /* Trial number within the run */,
  "reward_function" TEXT /* Type of reward function used in the trial */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotional state of the participant during the trial */,
  "magnitude" INTEGER /* Magnitude of the stimulus */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability associated with the trial */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained by the participant */,
  "expected_value" REAL /* Expected value of the trial */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "clock_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the clock event */,
  "isi_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the inter-stimulus interval (ISI) */,
  "feedback_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the feedback event */,
  "iti_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the inter-trial interval (ITI) */,
  "iti_ideal" REAL /* Ideal duration of the ITI */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_time" TEXT /* Time the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotional state associated with the image */,
  "magnitude" INTEGER /* Magnitude of the stimulus in the image */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., emotional, neutral, control) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the image was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_images" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image used in the trial */,
  "trial_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the trial within the run */,
  "image_position" INTEGER /* Position of the image in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_images_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the participant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or position of the researcher */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
